name: How do I prove my hearing loss came from my job and not getting old?
description: Use audiograms showing NIHL pattern, noise logs, and expert ruling out age.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: How do I prove my hearing loss came from my job and not getting old?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use audiograms showing NIHL pattern, noise logs, and expert ruling out age.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Prove causation with medical evidence like audiograms showing high-frequency NIHL patterns, plus workplace noise documentation.[1][4] Context: Courts require linking loss to job via OSHA logs, lack of protection, and expert opinions ruling out age-related causes.[1][4] Key factors: Pre- and post-exposure hearing tests, decibel measurements over 85 dB, coworker testimonies, employer negligence.[1][2] Practical guidance: Request your medical and exposure records, see an audiologist for a work-related diagnosis, avoid insurer talks alone; hire an attorney for expert witnesses.[2][7] Strong proof overcomes age defenses.
